products.title: Mindo Bird Watching Water Bottle — 20oz Tritan Sport Bottle with Tropical Logo | Mindo, Ecuador

The artwork pops through the transparent body, giving the bottle a clean, modern look while reminding you of rainforest mornings and bright bird calls. Designed for hikers, travelers, birders, and everyday explorers, it keeps water fresh without holding onto stains or odors. The wide-mouth opening makes it easy to add ice or pour in a quick refill, and the screw-on lid with a built-in straw keeps sips spill-free whether you’re on a trail, in a car, or at your desk. A loop on the lid lets you clip it to your pack with a carabiner for hands-free carrying on long outings. Lightweight, durable, and 100% BPA-free, this is the bottle you’ll reach for on early-morning walks, day trips through the rainforest, or simply when you want a touch of nature nearby.
